04 — Process

How It
Works

01
Contact

Reach out with your vision via Discord or email. Tell me about your game and what you need.

02
Agreement

We lock in scope, pricing & timeline together. 50% deposit to kick things off.

03
Creation

You get regular updates as your world takes shape inside Roblox Studio.

04
Delivery

Final RBXM/RBXL files, fully optimized and ready to drop into your game.

06 — FAQ

Common
Questions

What types of projects do you specialize in?+
Complete game environments, detailed structures, custom maps, and polished UI — from fantasy realms to horror atmospheres. If you can imagine it, I can build it in Roblox Studio.
What's your typical turnaround time?+
Simple builds: 3–5 days. Complex environments: 5–14 days depending on scope. Rush delivery is available for urgent projects at an adjusted rate.
What file formats will I receive?+
Production-ready RBXM/RBXL files, directly importable into Roblox Studio. Everything is organized, labeled, and optimized for performance.
Do you include revisions?+
Robux tier includes 1 revision round. PayPal tier includes 2 rounds. Additional revisions are available at fair rates.
Can you match any art style?+
Absolutely — realistic, cartoonish, low-poly, dark, colorful, futuristic. Send me references and I'll match your game's aesthetic perfectly.
